description: Tarun Chitra discusses his journey in the crypto industry, starting from his work in simulation-based research and ASIC development at D. Shaw Research. He shares insights on the evolution of finance, the intersection of crypto and traditional finance, and his initial experiences with Bitcoin mining.
topic_summary: In this episode, Tarun Chitra reflects on his background in technology and finance, the development of ASICs for protein folding, and his entry into the crypto space through hardware for Bitcoin mining. He contrasts the principles of distributed systems with the realities of cryptocurrencies, highlighting his shift from skepticism to belief in the technology.
